arts.ttl: Liverpool hit with new injury blow in Tottenham game as Arne Slot makes peculiar substitution
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Jarell Quansah is forced off with an early injury in the Reds' EFL Cup semi-final first leg against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Liverpool defensive crisis worsens as Arne Slot forced into change after injury
arts.sum: Jarell Quansah was replaced by Wataru Endo in the first half against Tottenham after picking up an injury

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Rodrigo Bentancur taken off on stretcher in worrying Liverpool scenes
arts.sum: The opening minutes of Liverpool's Carabao Cup semi-final vs Tottenham was marred by a serious injury to Rodrigo Bentancur

arts.ttl: Tottenham’s Rodrigo Bentancur carried off on a stretcher with worrying injury
arts.sum: Bentancur received medical attention for nine minutes before he was replaced by Brennan Johnson at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Bargain Champions League winner being lined up to replace Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool
arts.sum: The future of Trent Alexander-Arnold remains uncertain at Liverpool and the Premier League giants are considering a move for Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich to replace the right-back at Anfield. The England star is out of contract with the Merseyside club at the end of the season and is being heavily pursued by Real Madrid, who […] The post Bargain Champions League winner being lined up to replace Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham suffer worrying blow as 27-year-old stretchered off with head injury in Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's Rodrigo Bentancur is stretchered off with a head injury in the Lilywhites' EFL Cup semi-final first leg against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp reveals why playing for Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham 'would drive me insane'
arts.sum: Tottenham came into the semi-final amid a dreadful run of form, winning just two of their last 11 matches in all competitions, with Postecoglou's side struggling amid injuries.

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky reveals 'intense' Daniel Levy negotiations and key reason behind Tottenham transfer
arts.sum: However, Kinsky's agent, Viktor Kolar, has revealed how negotiations between both clubs were tough, as both Daniel Levy and Slavia's chairman Jaroslav Tvrdik initially refused to budge on their preferred terms. "We even got into a situation where Mr Tvrdik (Slavia’s Chairman) said, 'I want to do it' but he was not willing to give in, on the other side was Daniel Levy, who said he was also interested in doing it and completing the transfer but he was not willing to give in either and so it turned out that sometimes even those personal meetings really break the ice and those people can find consensus better.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team vs Liverpool confirmed as Antonin Kinsky starts with Yang Min-hyeok on the bench
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has thrown new signing Antonin Kinsky straight in for his debut in goal as Tottenham welcome Liverpool in the Carabao Cup semi-final first leg on Wednesday night. Spurs made their first signing of the January transfer window with the arrival of 21-year-old Kinsky from Slavia Prague in a deal that could be worth around £12.5million with add-ons.

arts.ttl: Rodrigo Bentancur suffers nasty injury in opening stages of Tottenham's Carabao Cup semi-final clash with Liverpool as he receives on-pitch treatment for NINE minutes before being stretchered off
arts.sum: The midfielder, who has just returned from a ban, started in midfield for the clash, though his night lasted just a matter of minutes before he hit the deck in concerning scenes.
